original_question: What are the years and names of trials that studied Pembrolizumab for Melanoma in phase 3?
gt_sql: SELECT "Year", "Name of ICI" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Pembrolizumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3';

query_1.question: What Year values are in trials where Name of ICI = 'Pembrolizumab' AND Cancer type = 'Melanoma' AND Trial phase = 'Phase 3'?

original_question: List the names of ipilimumab trials for melanoma where the overall follow-up duration was greater than 21 months?
gt_sql: SELECT "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;
